channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: AgentHub - Thu Jun 18 16:06:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
AgentHub adds a toolbar button to every JetBrains IDE that launches any popular CLI coding agent in its own terminal window — one click, no setup. Works with IntelliJ...
vendor: AgentHub downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.shutterstar.agenthub

item.title: Laravel Artisan Helper - Fri Jun 19 06:38:37 UTC 2026
item.description:
A lightweight productivity helper for Laravel projects. Artisan command palette — a searchable popup of common php artisan commands that runs them in a console, plus a...
vendor: TaxiCloud downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.taxicloud.artisanhelper

item.title: Property Key Support - Fri Jun 19 09:19:35 UTC 2026
item.description:
Bean Validation and Jakarta Validation annotations often reference message keys in braces, such as {name.required}, instead of plain property names. IntelliJ does not...
vendor: Prannoy Mathew downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.propertykey.support

item.title: Be Water Converter - Fri Jun 19 05:44:18 UTC 2026

vendor: nomikosi consulting downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.converter.be-water-converter

item.title: Qualimetry C# Analyzer - Fri Jun 19 04:53:17 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Atomica Brackets - Thu Jun 18 20:36:23 UTC 2026
item.description:
Rainbow brackets highlighting for nested parentheses, braces, and square brackets. Each nesting level gets a distinct color to make code structure easier to read.
